article.title: Noizekid: Moombahton and Dancehall Production in Mexico
article.subtitle: A profile of a producer shaping Latin electronic music with industry collaborations.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry.
He released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.
His production style is rooted in the energetic rhythms of moombahton and dancehall, with a focus on creating dynamic, club-ready tracks.

Noizekid's work is often characterized by its blend of electronic elements with traditional Latin rhythms, resulting in a distinctive sound that has garnered attention from both local and international audiences.
In addition to his solo productions, Noizekid has collaborated with a range of artists, contributing to the evolving landscape of Latin electronic music.
